completed.name: pyright
fixes_applied: Raised dev dependency lower bound to pyright>=1.1.411; uv.lock resolved pyright==1.1.411.

completed.name: ruff
breaking_changes: Ruff pre-1.0 minor releases can include lint/config behavior changes per versioning docs.
fixes_applied: Raised dev dependency lower bound to ruff>=0.15.20; uv.lock resolved ruff==0.15.20.

completed.name: maturin
fixes_applied: Raised project dependency to maturin>=1.14.1 and build-system requirement to maturin>=1.14.1,<2.

completed.name: pytest
breaking_changes: Python 3.9 support dropped; PytestRemovedIn9Warning deprecations become errors/default removals; overlapping duplicate path CLI behavior changed.
fixes_applied: Raised dev dependency lower bound to pytest>=9.1.1.

completed.name: pytest-asyncio
breaking_changes: Async fixture/event-loop behavior changed in the 0.25+ and 1.x line; pytest compatibility requirements increased.
fixes_applied: Raised dev dependency lower bound to pytest-asyncio>=1.4.0; previous loop-scope warning disappeared.

completed.name: einops
fixes_applied: Raised dependency lower bound to einops>=0.8.2.

completed.name: tqdm
fixes_applied: Raised dependency lower bound to tqdm>=4.68.3.

completed.name: tensorboardX
fixes_applied: Raised dependency lower bound to tensorboardx>=2.6.5.

completed.name: tensorboard
breaking_changes: TensorBoard 2.21.0 aligns with the TensorFlow 2.21 dependency stack and raises runtime dependency requirements: protobuf>=6.31.1,<8.0.0 and grpcio>=1.74.0,<2.0.
Project code does not call TensorBoard APIs directly; TensorBoard is used for experiment/log viewing and Lightning logging.
fixes_applied: Initially raised dependency lower bound to tensorboard>=2.20.0.
Direct dependency audit later found tensorboard 2.21.0 and raised the lower bound to tensorboard>=2.21.0.
Accepted resolver updates to grpcio==1.81.1 and protobuf==7.35.1.

completed.name: pydantic
breaking_changes: Minor-version v2 behavior changes possible; no v1-to-v2 migration.
fixes_applied: Raised dependency lower bound to pydantic>=2.13.4.

completed.name: tabulate
fixes_applied: Raised dependency lower bound to tabulate>=0.10.0.

completed.name: matplotlib
breaking_changes: Official API-change notes exist for 3.11.0; project source/tests do not directly use Matplotlib.
fixes_applied: Raised dependency lower bound to matplotlib>=3.11.0.

completed.name: optuna
fixes_applied: Raised dependency lower bound to optuna>=4.9.0.

completed.name: optuna-dashboard
fixes_applied: Raised dependency lower bound to optuna-dashboard>=0.20.0; transitive scikit-learn/joblib/threadpoolctl removed by resolver.

completed.name: typer
breaking_changes: No major-version migration identified; CLI/help rendering can change across Typer/Click/Rich releases.
fixes_applied: Raised dependency lower bound to typer>=0.26.8; accepted resolver changes adding annotated-doc and removing click from Typer dependency graph.

completed.name: crossbeam-channel
fixes_applied: Raised Rust dependency to crossbeam-channel = "0.5.15".

completed.name: log
fixes_applied: Raised Rust dependency to log = "0.4.33".

completed.name: env_logger
fixes_applied: Raised Rust dependency to env_logger = "0.11.11".
Added BINDGEN_EXTRA_CLANG_ARGS discovery via scripts/find-libclang.py and mise.toml after librocksdb-sys bindgen could not find stdbool.h.

completed.name: num_cpus
fixes_applied: Raised Rust dependency to num_cpus = "1.17.0"; transitive hermit-abi refreshed.

completed.name: parking_lot
breaking_changes: 0.12.5 raises MSRV; project uses modern stable Rust.
fixes_applied: Raised Rust dependency to parking_lot = "0.12.5"; transitive lock_api/parking_lot_core refreshed.

completed.name: serde
fixes_applied: Raised Rust dependency lower bound to serde = { version = "1.0.228", features = ["derive"] }.

completed.name: proptest
breaking_changes: MSRV increases and config-precedence behavior changes in the range; current proptest macro/strategy usage remained compatible.
fixes_applied: Raised Rust dev dependency to proptest = "1.11.0"; test-only dependency graph refreshed.

completed.name: indicatif
breaking_changes: 0.18.0 is a documented breaking point; current progress-bar usage compiled without migration.
fixes_applied: Raised Rust dependency to indicatif = "0.18.5"; progress-bar transitive graph refreshed.

completed.name: rand
breaking_changes: Distribution APIs moved from rand::distributions to rand::distr; WeightedIndex path changed.
fixes_applied: Raised Rust dependency to rand = "0.10.1".
Updated MCTS import to rand::distr::{weighted::WeightedIndex, Distribution}.

completed.name: ratatui
breaking_changes: block::Title removed; Frame::size deprecated/renamed; Buffer::get_mut deprecated; Bar label/text generic Into signatures can cause inference failures; Crossterm/MSRV updates.
fixes_applied: Replaced block::Title with Line::centered().
Used frame.area().
Replaced Buffer::get_mut with buffer indexing.
Removed ambiguous .into() calls for Bar::label and Bar::text_value.

completed.name: rocksdb
fixes_applied: Raised Rust dependency to rocksdb = "0.24.0"; native librocksdb-sys/bindgen stack refreshed.

completed.name: numpy-python
breaking_changes: NumPy 2.4.6 is a bugfix release in the 2.x line; native boundary validated with PyO3/rust-numpy updates.
fixes_applied: Raised Python dependency lower bound to numpy>=2.4.6.

completed.name: pyo3
breaking_changes: Removed/renamed PyObject alias, Python::with_gil/allow_threads, to_object, PyBytes::new_bound, and older call/conversion APIs; module free-threaded default changed.
fixes_applied: Migrated to Py<PyAny>, clone().unbind(), Python::attach/detach, PyBytes::new, call, from_py_object pyclasses, and #[pymodule(gil_used = true)].

completed.name: numpy-rust
breaking_changes: rust-numpy helper names changed; _bound constructors/conversions replaced by from_array/from_slice/into_pyarray.
fixes_applied: Updated PyArray constructors/conversions to rust-numpy 0.29 APIs.

completed.name: torch
breaking_changes: torch.load defaults to weights_only=True in newer PyTorch; project source has no direct torch.load usage.
PyPI wheels resolve CUDA 13.0-era dependencies; older GPU architectures may require the separate CUDA 12.6 wheel.
fixes_applied: Added torch>=2.12.1 as a direct dependency because project code imports torch directly.
Reinstalled nvidia-cudnn-cu13 and nvidia-nccl-cu13 locally after the old cu12 namespace uninstall removed shared library files during the transition.

completed.name: pytorch-lightning
breaking_changes: Lightning minor releases can include backwards-incompatible changes with deprecations; no current Trainer/LightningModule/DataModule/callback API migration was required.
fixes_applied: Raised dependency lower bound to pytorch-lightning>=2.6.5.

completed.name: torchmetrics
breaking_changes: TorchMetrics 1.9 drops Python 3.9 support and includes breaking changes for metrics not used here; current KLDivergence and MeanSquaredError usage remained compatible.
fixes_applied: Raised dependency lower bound to torchmetrics>=1.9.0.

completed.name: jupyterlab
breaking_changes: No project-impacting breaking changes identified in the official JupyterLab 4.6 changelog; project has no custom JupyterLab extensions or direct JupyterLab API usage.
fixes_applied: Raised project and dev dependency lower bounds to jupyterlab>=4.6.1.
Accepted resolver updates to jupyter-events 0.12.1, jupyter-server 2.20.0, jupyterlab-server 2.28.0, and added jupyter-builder 1.0.2.
tests: mise exec -- uv run jupyter lab --version

completed.name: pandas
breaking_changes: pandas 3.0 requires Python 3.11+; project requires/runs Python 3.11.
Copy-on-Write is enabled by default; prior deprecations were removed; default timezone handling moves from pytz to zoneinfo.
Project source/tests do not import pandas directly; dependency is notebook/experiment tooling.
fixes_applied: Raised dev dependency lower bound to pandas>=3.0.3.
Accepted resolver changes removing unconditional pytz, making tzdata platform-conditional, and refreshing uv resolution markers.

notes: Migrated tool.uv.dev-dependencies to dependency-groups.dev; mise run ci passed.
Slice 2 small-python completed; mise run ci passed after Typer update.
env_logger update initially exposed a librocksdb-sys bindgen stdbool.h include issue; fixed with portable BINDGEN_EXTRA_CLANG_ARGS discovery.
Slice 3 small-rust completed; mise run ci passed after indicatif update.
Slice 4 medium-rust completed; mise run ci passed after rocksdb update.
Native boundary milestone updated Python numpy, PyO3, and rust-numpy together; PyO3/rust-numpy API migration completed and focused tests passed.
Slice 5 native-boundary completed; mise run ci passed after Python numpy + Rust PyO3/rust-numpy updates.
ML-stack milestone focused validation passed for torch, pytorch-lightning, and torchmetrics; full slice CI pending.
Slice 6 ml-stack completed; mise run ci passed after torch + pytorch-lightning + torchmetrics updates.
ML-stack CI still emits an upstream PyTorch Lightning _pytree.LeafSpec deprecation warning under PyTorch 2.12; no project call site identified.
JupyterLab updated to 4.6.1; version check, Python tests, and uv lock check passed.
pandas updated to 3.0.3; project has no direct pandas imports, and Python tests plus uv lock check passed.
rankit 0.3.3 and loguru 0.7.3 are already at the latest stable versions found; no manifest changes required.
Slice 7 notebook-experiment completed; mise run ci passed after JupyterLab and pandas updates and rankit/loguru latest-stable checks.
Direct dependency audit found TensorBoard 2.21.0 after the earlier TensorBoard 2.20 update; refreshed to 2.21.0 and focused validation passed.
